_comment: Loanword stress overrides. Key = NFC vocalized Hebrew exactly as translit.js hebrewKey() reconstructs it. Value = stressed syllable counted from the END, 1-based: 1=final(milra), 2=penult(mil'el), 3=antepenult. Nothing in the niqqud marks a loanword, so stress is listed explicitly. Words here MUST NOT be used to tune the phonotactic/stress rules in translit.js (held-out discipline).
